Off Calendar Mar-03-2020 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-04-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Branden Meadows appeared by telephone for Richard Quigley (Petitioner).
Michael Rossi (Parish Administrator at St. Dominic's Catholic Church) in Propria Persona.
Gregory Misakian (Friend of Decedent and Neighbor) in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that Mr. Misakian filed objections and that it is not clear Mr. Misakian has any standing to do so. Mr. Rossi stated that he has not discussed with the Pastor whether St. Dominic's will be filing objections, that it is something he can do, and that he is not in a position to say whether St. Dominic's is going to either contest the appointment of Mr. Quigley or file a competing petition. The Court stated that is has some concern about facts regarding Mr. Meadows' Client's conduct, and that there is evidence that the Client violated the Police order and that he cut the yellow Police tape. Mr. Meadows stated that his Client has not violated a Police order, that once the locks were changed he has not entered and that he only entered the premises when he was given authority by the Public Administrator to search for a will. Mr. Misakian stated that the two organizations (St. Dominic's and St. Anthony's) weren't fully understanding of the proceedings, that his only interest is the Decedent's wishes and that St. Anthony's is just now becoming aware of the proceedings. The Court stated that there has been a lot of time for someone to do something, that it is appropriate to have someone in place, that the opportunity to file objections was given and that no one with standing has filed any objections. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to receipt and review of the order). Bond is waived. Mr. Meadows is to provide a form of order. Status on close of estate is set for March 3, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.

This was a pre-granted matter. Mr. Misakian stated that in his conversations with the Decedent, her wishes were for her entire Estate to go to Saint Dominic's Church and Saint Anthony's Church. Mr. Rossi stated that he is planning on challenging the will. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to August 15, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Objections are to be filed no later than Thursday August 9th.
